title: Kanban Board Redesign
changes: Replaced SVG warehouse with Kanban board layout (5 columns: Queue, Active, Review, Approved, Complete)
Task cards with role-colored left borders replace warehouse packages
Rework tasks appear naturally in Queue column — no flow arrows needed
Blocked/cancelled tasks in separate bottom bar
All flow arrows and arrowhead markers removed
Non-process stations (HOMEPAGE entries) removed from UI
Agent status bar at top shows agent-to-task assignment
Debounced approval mode dropdown to prevent phantom writes
Search with live filtering across task cards
